headline: Carnival Corporation Completes New Pier Extension for Celebration Key in The Bahamas
summary: Carnival Corporation (NYSE: CCL), the world's largest cruise company, today announced the successful completion of its Celebration Key pier extension on Grand Bahama Island. The flagship expansion adds two new berths, enabling Celebration Key to accommodate up to four ships simultaneously and welcome over 13,000 guests in a day to the popular exclusive destination.
